message: Jake
Meryl
The older frontman nods lightly at me. I wonder if I've been coming so often that he greets me now.
Oh, welcome.
I brought good news today.
Wow! I'm feeling all fluttery like a high school girl.
Look
Report
System
The surroundings
about the daughter
Save
Exit the game
In front of the window overlooking Manhattan,
is occupied.
A strong smell of alcohol is wafting in the air.
It seems she didn't just drink the one bottle on the table.
Even though there's a famous actress lying right in front of me, looking provocative, I'm not that excited. She seems to have a toxic vibe.
Perhaps she's in a good mood from the alcohol, giving me a wide smile.
She’s wearing just a thin gown that reveals her body shape. Is she trying to tempt me?
She seems so youthful and alluring that I can't believe she already has a teenager.
Actually, I was able to track down your daughter.
Is that true? I find it hard to believe.
She was a very beautiful young lady.
Of course. She’s my daughter, even if we've lived apart. If she wasn't beautiful, it would be a lie.
That makes sense.
But you're amazing! You managed to find her in no time. To be honest, I was quite anxious.
Well, I was anxious too. But by sheer coincidence, I was able to meet her.
You were just lucky, I'm sure.
Oh dear, what should I do? I'm really feeling all nervous.
So, when can I see my daughter?
Ah, that's not decided yet.
Come on, you're not just saying you want to confirm that she's alive, right? If I can't see her, it has no meaning, you know?
W-well, that's true, but she also needs some time to prepare emotionally.
Ariana is my daughter. She doesn't need to prepare for anything. Now, hurry up and take me to her!
Y-yes!
It's frustrating to be scolded when I'm trying my best.
Ah.
Ah, I just want to throw it all away.
Oh, right. Speaking of which, I've forgotten to take my time to relax recently. I should go do that.
I'm sure he will comfort me.
